name: velkross
description: Mergeability-first guidance and reusable skills for scoped, durable, verifiable code changes.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Codex changes scoped, durable, and ready to merge.
interface.longDescription: Velkross combines always-on Mergeability-first Engineering guidance with reusable skills to help Codex make focused changes that fit the existing design, preserve relevant contracts, and verify behavior in proportion to risk.
defaultPrompt: Use Velkross while implementing this change.
Review this diff with Velkross mergeability guidance.
Help me choose the smallest durable next step.
